title: <AgentName> Input
description: Input schema for <AgentName> v1. Replace placeholders with agent-specific fields.

query.description: The user query or task description driving this agent invocation.

context.description: Session and environment context provided by the orchestrator.

session_id.description: CIC session identifier. Used to scope session-store reads and writes.

user_id.description: Authenticated user identifier. Never logged in checkpoint records.

metadata.description: Optional caller-supplied metadata. Passed through unmodified to output.

trace_id.description: Distributed trace ID for cross-service correlation. Generated by orchestrator if absent.
